content.speakerText: Can you show me the perfume you bought?
content.speakerTextCn: 能给我看看您买的香水吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course, here it is — still sealed.
Sure, I haven't opened it yet.
I've got it in my suitcase; let me get it for you.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确出示了商品
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'sealed', 'show', 'bought' 等关键词

content.speakerText: Is this the only item you're claiming?
expectedAnswers: No, I also have a watch and a scarf in my bag.
Yes, just this one — I double-checked.
Wait, I forgot my sunglasses — can I add them too?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否完整列出所有退货商品或明确确认唯一性
语言准确性：是否使用了正确动词和介词（e.g., 'in my bag', 'have'）
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化表达（如 'Wait, I forgot...'）
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'claiming', 'item', 'bag' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Please confirm the quantity and condition of the items you're returning.
content.speakerTextCn: 请确认您要退回的商品数量和状态。
expectedAnswers: I'm returning three items: the perfume is sealed, the watch is unused, and the jacket has a small tag still on.
There are three things here — all in new condition, no damage.
Let me check... one perfume (sealed), one watch (box intact), and one jacket (tag still attached).
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否同时说明了数量和状态
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的形容词（sealed, unused, intact）和结构
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化列举方式（e.g., 'Let me check...'）
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'quantity', 'condition', 'returning', 'sealed', 'unused' 等核心词汇
